title: Aurangabad、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Aurangabad、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Aurangabad是Maharashtra的一個城市，人口約1,400,000。A historic city in Maharashtra, gateway to the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora caves, with a growing manufacturing sector.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
